series_metadata.series_description: The policy number can be requested by the Employer, Third Party Administrator, or BWC Employee. The entire file is scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: If the policy status is any status other than Active or Reinstated, retain in UDS for a 10 year period of inactivity. ; Paper: If the policy status is: · Active or Reinstated: Original documents will be destroyed after scanned into UDS, and the scanned image is verified as readable. · Cancelled by Employer: Original documents will be destroyed when: · Account balance is zero, and · There has been no activity in the policy for a two year period after cancellation date. · Any status other than Active or Reinstated, with a balance due on account: Original documents will be destroyed when there has been no activity in the policy for a 5 year period., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
